# Complete Example — Dual-Subscription VNet Integration with Full Features

This example demonstrates a full enterprise configuration with both production and non-production
tier VNet integration across separate Azure subscriptions.

It shows:

- **Dual-subscription isolation** — production and non-production environments deployed to separate Azure subscriptions via provider aliases
- **Primary + failover VNet** pair per tier for high availability
- **Full NSG rule set** for Power Platform VNet injection connectivity
- **Private DNS zones** for private endpoint connectivity
- **Custom resource naming** with explicit resource group name overrides
- **Comprehensive tagging** strategy

## Prerequisites

1. Deploy [`ptn-environmentgroup`](https://registry.terraform.io/modules/rpothin/ptn-environmentgroup/powerplatform/latest) with at least one Production and one Sandbox environment
2. Ensure all environments are **Managed Environments**
3. Configure separate Azure subscriptions for production and non-production workloads
4. Configure OIDC credentials for Azure and Power Platform providers

## CIDR Planning

Production and non-production tiers use non-overlapping address spaces:

- **Non-production primary**: `10.0.0.0/16` (failover: `10.1.0.0/16`)
- **Production primary**: `10.10.0.0/16` (failover: `10.11.0.0/16`)

<!-- markdownlint-disable MD033 -->
## Requirements

The following requirements are needed by this module:

- <a name="requirement_terraform"></a> [terraform](#requirement\_terraform) (>= 1.9, < 2.0)

- <a name="requirement_azapi"></a> [azapi](#requirement\_azapi) (~> 2.0)

- <a name="requirement_azurerm"></a> [azurerm](#requirement\_azurerm) (~> 4.0)

- <a name="requirement_powerplatform"></a> [powerplatform](#requirement\_powerplatform) (~> 4.0)

## Resources

No resources.

<!-- markdownlint-disable MD013 -->
## Required Inputs

The following input variables are required:

### <a name="input_environments"></a> [environments](#input\_environments)

Description: Map of Power Platform environments. Typically the direct output of ptn-environmentgroup.environments.

Type:

```hcl
map(object({
    id            = string
    display_name  = string
    type          = string
    dataverse_url = optional(string)
    location      = string
  }))
```

### <a name="input_non_production_subscription_id"></a> [non\_production\_subscription\_id](#input\_non\_production\_subscription\_id)

Description: Azure subscription ID for non-production resources.

Type: `string`

### <a name="input_production_subscription_id"></a> [production\_subscription\_id](#input\_production\_subscription\_id)

Description: Azure subscription ID for production resources.

Type: `string`

## Optional Inputs

The following input variables are optional (have default values):

### <a name="input_enterprise_policy_location"></a> [enterprise\_policy\_location](#input\_enterprise\_policy\_location)

Description: The Power Platform region for the enterprise policy (must match the environment group location).

Type: `string`

Default: `"unitedstates"`

### <a name="input_environment_group_name"></a> [environment\_group\_name](#input\_environment\_group\_name)

Description: The name of the environment group (must match the ptn-environmentgroup deployment).

Type: `string`

Default: `"example-complete"`

### <a name="input_non_production_failover_vnet_location"></a> [non\_production\_failover\_vnet\_location](#input\_non\_production\_failover\_vnet\_location)

Description: Azure region for the non-production failover VNet.

Type: `string`

Default: `"westus"`

### <a name="input_non_production_primary_vnet_location"></a> [non\_production\_primary\_vnet\_location](#input\_non\_production\_primary\_vnet\_location)

Description: Azure region for the non-production primary VNet.

Type: `string`

Default: `"eastus"`

### <a name="input_non_production_resource_group_location"></a> [non\_production\_resource\_group\_location](#input\_non\_production\_resource\_group\_location)

Description: Azure region for the non-production resource group.

Type: `string`

Default: `"eastus"`

### <a name="input_private_dns_zone_names"></a> [private\_dns\_zone\_names](#input\_private\_dns\_zone\_names)

Description: List of private DNS zone names to create in each tier.

Type: `list(string)`

Default:

```json
[
  "privatelink.blob.core.windows.net",
  "privatelink.dfs.core.windows.net"
]
```

### <a name="input_production_failover_vnet_location"></a> [production\_failover\_vnet\_location](#input\_production\_failover\_vnet\_location)

Description: Azure region for the production failover VNet.

Type: `string`

Default: `"westus2"`

### <a name="input_production_primary_vnet_location"></a> [production\_primary\_vnet\_location](#input\_production\_primary\_vnet\_location)

Description: Azure region for the production primary VNet.

Type: `string`

Default: `"eastus2"`

### <a name="input_production_resource_group_location"></a> [production\_resource\_group\_location](#input\_production\_resource\_group\_location)

Description: Azure region for the production resource group.

Type: `string`

Default: `"eastus2"`

### <a name="input_tags"></a> [tags](#input\_tags)

Description: Tags to apply to all Azure resources.

Type: `map(string)`

Default:

```json
{
  "managed_by": "terraform",
  "module": "ptn-environmentgroup-vnetintegration"
}
```

## Outputs

The following outputs are exported:

### <a name="output_enterprise_policy_links"></a> [enterprise\_policy\_links](#output\_enterprise\_policy\_links)

Description: Flat map of all enterprise policy links across both tiers.

### <a name="output_non_production_enterprise_policy_id"></a> [non\_production\_enterprise\_policy\_id](#output\_non\_production\_enterprise\_policy\_id)

Description: ARM resource ID of the non-production enterprise policy.

### <a name="output_non_production_failover_vnet_id"></a> [non\_production\_failover\_vnet\_id](#output\_non\_production\_failover\_vnet\_id)

Description: ARM resource ID of the non-production failover virtual network.

### <a name="output_non_production_primary_vnet_id"></a> [non\_production\_primary\_vnet\_id](#output\_non\_production\_primary\_vnet\_id)

Description: ARM resource ID of the non-production primary virtual network.

### <a name="output_non_production_resource_group_name"></a> [non\_production\_resource\_group\_name](#output\_non\_production\_resource\_group\_name)

Description: Name of the non-production Azure resource group.

### <a name="output_production_enterprise_policy_id"></a> [production\_enterprise\_policy\_id](#output\_production\_enterprise\_policy\_id)

Description: ARM resource ID of the production enterprise policy.

### <a name="output_production_failover_vnet_id"></a> [production\_failover\_vnet\_id](#output\_production\_failover\_vnet\_id)

Description: ARM resource ID of the production failover virtual network.

### <a name="output_production_primary_vnet_id"></a> [production\_primary\_vnet\_id](#output\_production\_primary\_vnet\_id)

Description: ARM resource ID of the production primary virtual network.

### <a name="output_production_resource_group_name"></a> [production\_resource\_group\_name](#output\_production\_resource\_group\_name)

Description: Name of the production Azure resource group.
